name: meta-fcis
description: Graph-centered, plugin-driven, LLM-safe application engine workspace.

scripts.smoke: pnpm --filter @meta-fcis/core smoke && pnpm --filter @meta-fcis/core smoke:expressions && pnpm --filter @meta-fcis/core smoke:selectors && pnpm --filter @meta-fcis/core smoke:policies && pnpm --filter @meta-fcis/core smoke:intents && pnpm --filter @meta-fcis/core smoke:transactions && pnpm --filter @meta-fcis/core smoke:graph && pnpm --filter @meta-fcis/shell smoke
